tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij zdania, wstawiając wyrazy podane w nawiasach w odpowiedniej formie. Wymagana jest pełna poprawność gramatyczna i ortograficzna odpowiedzi.

items.context: If you _________ (study) harder last semester, you _________ (pass) the entrance exam without any problems.
You _________ (must / eat) the whole cake — there is hardly any left! You _________ (should / ask) me first.
If she _________ (leave) home earlier, she _________ (not / miss) the last train to Warsaw.
He _________ (can / speak) four languages by the time he was sixteen, which meant he _________ (need / not / use) a translator abroad.
answer: did not (didn't) need to use, needn't have used

items.context: I wish I _________ (be) taller so that I _________ (can / reach) the top shelf without a ladder.
Provided that the weather _________ (be) fine tomorrow, we _________ (might / go) for a hike in the mountains.
